Welcome to

Calmar Transport

Wherever you need to go, trust in our wheels to get you there, reliably and swiftly. Your journey, our commitment - with Calmar Transport
Enquiry Now

About Calmar Transport

Established in 2018 and headquartered in Edmonton, Calmar Transport is a privately owned Canadian company with a robust team boasting a combined 40 years of industry experience. Our expertise in transport and logistics is renowned throughout the sector

What We Offer

At Calmar Transport, we prioritize reliability, quality, and efficiency. Our dedicated services are designed to be time- and cost-effective, ensuring customer satisfaction 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. We employ only the best in the business, adhering strictly to all state and provincial regulations.

Calmar Transport

Our Operations

With operations spanning across Canada and the USA, we are well-equipped to handle a variety of logistics needs. In addition to our main office in Edmonton, we have truck terminals in Calgary, Denver CO, Salt Lake, Utah, and El Paso, Texas, strategically located to better serve our clients.

Trailer Drop Service
Calmar Transport offers a comprehensive trailer drop service designed to meet the diverse needs of our clients. Our trailer drop service allows customers to load and unload trailers at their convenience, providing unmatched flexibility and efficiency.
Enquiry Now

We value family and community and hold our rural ties close to our hearts.

We actively pursue opportunities to support local and provide opportunities for sustainable, diversified growth and employment.

Brokerage Services

Calmar Transport has been offering brokerage services for over a decade. Do you have merchandise ready to ship but need assistance in finding the right truck for your shipment?

We provide freight forwarding to help you secure the best deal. Our long-term relationships with all our carriers ensure reliability and efficiency.

Let us manage the logistics of your freight forwarding needs. With our extensive knowledge of the shipping industry and vast network, we can help you reduce costs and obtain the best price.

We Provide Services in these 3 Countries

Canada

USA

Mexico

What we do

Expertise

At Calmar Transport, we prioritize reliability, quality, and efficiency. Our dedicated services are designed to be time- and cost-effective, ensuring customer satisfaction 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. We employ only the best in the business, adhering strictly to all state and provincial regulations.

Temperature Control Shipments

1500+

Trusted Transportation and Logistics

At Calmar Transport, we’ve been delivering a comprehensive range of transport services for consignments, big and small, throughout the Canada region for over 25 years! Our fleet of delivery trucks and vans is equipped to handle all types of cargo, including industrial supplies, retail stock, shop equipment, eBay purchases, freight forwarding, and much more. Always going the extra mile, our qualified and experienced truck drivers courier your items with care and attention, ensuring professional and timely delivery every time.

Attentive all the way, we at Calmar Transport listen closely to your needs, questions, concerns, and instructions, always saying yes! Many consider us the go-to guys for Central Coast couriers. Find us on Google Maps.

Connecting Destinations, Delivering Excellence

Navigating your world with care, we take you everywhere. Seamless travel, beyond compare. Your trusted transport, always there.

Need Help?

Don’t hesitate to contact us for more information about company or service

Key Benefits :

  • Convenient Loading and Unloading: Trailers can be dropped at your location, giving you the freedom to load or unload at your own pace.
  • Reduced Downtime: By having trailers available when you need them, you minimize waiting times and improve operational efficiency.
  • Cost-Effective: Our trailer drop service helps you optimize your logistics process, reducing labor costs and improving overall productivity.
  • Wide Coverage: Available throughout Canada and the USA, ensuring seamless service across borders.

Why Choose us :

  • Expert Knowledge: Our team’s extensive experience ensures top-notch service.
  • Dedicated Services: We tailor our services to meet the unique needs of each customer.
  • Compliance and Safety: We strictly follow all state and provincial regulations, ensuring safe and reliable transport.
  • Advanced Tracking: To enhance our service quality and provide peace of mind, all our trailers are equipped with advanced tracking devices. This allows for real-time monitoring and ensures the security of your cargo throughout its journey.
